results.rendered_html:
sraṃsin 1〉 adj.
a〉 auseinanderfallend: māṃsa  MĀLATĪM. 79,3 . herabfallend: kucataṭe sraṃsi vastraṃ vidhatte  Spr. (II) 7199 . sich lösend: bandha  ŚĀK. 29 . heraushängend: Auge  SUŚR. 2,332,18 , v. l. (sraṃsi ruksrāva˚).
— b〉 fallen lassend, abortirend (vgl. prasraṃsin): yoni  SUŚR. 2,396,12 .
— 2〉 m. ein best. Baum, = pīlu  AK. 2,4,2,9 .

results.rendered_html:
sraṃsin a. (nī f.) [sraṃs-ṇini]
1 Falling or slipping down, hanging down, being loosened, giving way; baṃdhe sraṃsini caikahastayamitāḥ paryākulā mūrdhajāḥ  Ś. 1. 30. 
2 Depending, pendulous, hanging loosely.
